game_name: Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic established immediately in side-scrolling format
Defeated by jumping on them; encourages vertical traversal
Optional collection mechanic; rewards exploration and thoroughness
Offensive and mobility tool; extends reach and puzzle-solving options

typical_relief_triggers: Open platforms with clear safe zones
Completion of scooter part collection on a level
typical_tension_triggers: Hidden scooter parts creating uncertainty about complete level mastery
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate arcade-style platformer pacing with exploration layering; tension built through enemy placement and precision platforming rather than constant threat

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden scooter parts scattered throughout levels encourage thorough exploration of every platform section
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Scooter parts hidden in non-obvious locations; rewards deviation from critical path

difficulty_curve.early_game: Simple side-scrolling platform traversal with basic enemy encounters; establishes dash and jump mechanics
notable_spikes: Scooter part collection creates optional difficulty spike for completionists

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains one hidden scooter part that must be located; creates secondary objective layer beyond reaching level exit
Linear left-to-right progression with enemy placement creating rhythm obstacles and vertical platforming challenges

sources_used: wikipedia: Chester Cheetah article - Video games section (1992 video game subsection)
